subcodes.first_line: O Ruhi! Upon thee be the salutations of God, the Lord of all beings and the Lord of the throne and earth. We have verily sent unto thee a luminous Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا روحی علیک سلام الله مولی الوری و رب العرش و الثری قد ارسلنا الیک لوحا لاح
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for healing, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
